untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of shadow percentages to median values stored in a lookup table (0.44%, 0.90%, 0.92%) and regime-specific volume logic (volume wins in 2 of 3 columns for bull/up breakouts vs. falling volume for bull/down breakouts). The backtest engine lacks: (1) table lookup capability, (2) multi-regime conditional volume logic, (3) breakout detection indicators, and (4) performance metric comparison. Shadow ratios must be normalized by 'breakout price' which is not a standard indicator. Recommend implementing custom indicator for shadow_pct_upper and shadow_pct_lower with regime-aware volume filters.
translation_notes: Used upper_wick and lower_wick as proxies for shadow measurements; converted median percentages (0.44%, 0.90%) to decimal scale (0.0044, 0.0090). Volume condition simplified to vol_ratio_20 > 1 as approximation. Original signal requires implementation of breakout regime detection and multi-column performance table matching logic not available in standard indicators.
